consent.title: Required Consents
consent.subtitle: To continue using Arcus CRM, we need your consent.
consent.terms_desc: I have read and accept the Terms of Use of Arcus CRM.
consent.privacy_desc: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy, which explains how your data is collected and used.
consent.data_processing_desc: I authorize the processing of my personal data for use of the platform.
consent.marketing_desc: I agree to receive promotional communications and news by email.
consent.analytics_desc: I authorize the collection of usage data to improve the platform.
